dataSource.type: WordPress REST API - Custom Post Type
dataSource.notes: The React app at #product-finder-root fetches data from the WP REST API custom post type 'finderproducts'. The page also references productFinderFilters inline JS config that defines which filter columns appear per category.

title.rendered.example: PXIe-25G High Speed Avionics Network Test Instrument

featured_media.description: WordPress media ID for product image

product-name.example: High Speed (100G) Avionics Network Test Instrument

product_description.example: PXI Express Instrument for test and simulation of Fibre Channel and Avionics Ethernet (10G/25G/40G/100G).

product-search-weight.description: Sort/priority weight for search results display order (lower = higher priority within category)

product-brochure.description: Link to product brochure/datasheet. Can be ACF link object or direct URL string

schema.title: string
schema.url: string (URL to PDF, HubSpot form, or external product page)

supported_bus_table.description: Supported bus details with optional popup information

typical_test_applications_table.description: Test application details with optional popup information

possibleValues: Concurrent parallel and serial bus test

number_of_channels_filter.description: Channel count filter (for Analog, Optical, Switching, Parallel Digital categories)

function_filter.description: Instrument function filter (Analog Test category only)
possibleValues: High Density Multifunction Parallel Analog Test Instrument

resolution_filter.description: ADC/DAC resolution filter (Analog Test category only)

analog_bandwidth_filter.description: Analog bandwidth filter (Analog Test category only)

sample_rate_filter.description: Sample rate filter (Analog Test category only)

serialBusTest.name: 12G Serial I/O Instrument
serialBusTest.description: Multi-port, software-defined PXIe instrument for high-speed serial bus test, up to 12.5 Gb/s, supporting a wide range of advanced aerospace and defense test applications.

serialBusTest.name: Optical I/O Expansion Instrument
serialBusTest.description: 4-Channel Copper to optical conversion for Multi-Gigabit serial buses.

opticalTest.name: Wide-Range Optical Power Module, LXI Format
opticalTest.description: 8-port Wide-Range Power Module for optical testing featuring extended range power attenuation across the network operating range.

opticalTest.description: 16-port adjustable optical power transmit and measurement for functional verification of network operations.

opticalTest.name: Multi-Protocol Switch Module, LXI Format
opticalTest.description: 16-port switching module supporting numerous SFP transceivers for multiple bus protocols from 100M to 10G.

opticalTest.name: PXIe Switch Matrix and Optical Power Management
opticalTest.description: 8-port integrated PXIe instrument for high-speed serial bus switching and fiber optics operational verification.

parallelDigitalTest.name: High-Density VXI-based Parallel Digital Instrument
parallelDigitalTest.description: Powerful parallel digital test instrument with performance, density, flexibility, and reliability to meet the most challenging Aerospace and Defense test requirements.

parallelDigitalTest.name: 8G Hybrid I/O Instrument
parallelDigitalTest.description: Software-defined PXIe test instrument for concurrently operating high-speed serial and parallel buses.

parallelDigitalTest.name: Reconfigurable LVTTL I/O Instrument
parallelDigitalTest.description: Software-defined digital PXIe test instrument with 96 bi-directional LVTTL channels. Supports functional and boundary scan testing.

parallelDigitalTest.name: Reconfigurable Digital Instrument with Pin Electronics
parallelDigitalTest.description: Software-defined parallel digital PXIe test instrument with per-pin programmable voltage and timing. Supports 32-channels of functional and boundary scan testing.

parallelDigitalTest.name: Reconfigurable Digital I/O Instrument
parallelDigitalTest.description: Software-defined parallel digital PXIe test instrument with integrated funnel. Supports 32 dynamic or up to 64 static channels of parallel digital and boundary scan testing.

configurableTestSystems.name: Portable, Configurable, At-platform Field Deployable Test System
configurableTestSystems.description: Ruggedized, automated test platform for field testing. Guardian's open architecture and software-defined configurability allows it to address a wide range of today's field test applications.

configurableTestSystems.name: Compact Functional Test System
configurableTestSystems.description: Fully integrated, highly-configurable, PXI-based test system optimized for testing a focused group of Units Under Test (UUTs).

configurableTestSystems.name: High-Speed, High-Performance Functional Test System
configurableTestSystems.description: Fully integrated, highly-configurable, PXI-based test system optimized for high-speed, advanced mixed-technology test applications.

configurableTestSystems.name: High-Performance, High-Density Functional Test System
configurableTestSystems.description: Fully integrated, high-density, VXI-based configurable test system optimized for a wide range of test applications and a large number of products.

analogTest.name: High Density Multifunction Parallel Analog Test Instrument
analogTest.description: 32-channels, 6 instruments per channel (DMM, Digitizer, Timer Counter, Limit Detector, Function Generator, Arbitrary Waveform Generator).

breakdown.Serial Bus Test (672): 19 products (HSSub-6xxx, HSSub-8xxx, HSSub-9xxx, PXIe-25G, PXIe-1553, PXIe-C429)
breakdown.Configurable Test Systems (669): 4 products (Guardian, Spectrum BT, Spectrum HS, Spectrum-9100)

summary.note: Some products appear in multiple categories (e.g., Verta products appear in both Optical Test and Switching, HSSub-6140 appears in both Serial Bus Test and Parallel Digital Test). The Analog Test category has ~35 products but the API only returns the first page. The 'products' post type (product_cat=35) contains higher-level marketing pages for Guardian, Tempo, Spectrum RF Systems, HSSub, and Mixed-Technology Test Systems.
